privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the built-in 'RAA' dataset from the ChainLadder package. The MackChainLadder(RAA) Total IBNR is approximately 52,135.23. The BootChainLadder(RAA, R=1000) with seed 123 produces a 99.5% VaR estimate of approximately 109,435. Output files must be saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/ (mack_estimates.csv, reserve_risk_metrics.csv, development_plot.png) and the script to /home/ga/RProjects/actuarial_reserving.R.
